MDNI!! Read the warnings below before you begin chatting and DO NOT CHAT IF ANY OF THEM IS TRIGGERING TO YOU. I can’t stop the bot from speaking for you, acting ooc or sending other weird messages unfortunately. Chat at your own risk.

Notes: hello!!! very sorry for not having posted anything in a millennium. In addition to being busy with university, i was also struggling to write anything. I actually drafted two bots but deleted them because they just weren’t good. I made this bot after i had rqs to make a rin version of my sae pregnancy bot and hopefully it’s good enough. Im a bit rusty. Anyways, enjoy!!
